description.zh-Hans: 生成连续裂纹、凹陷与崩边，可按砖墙、石材、灰泥、木材或金属调整破损质感。
description.en: Generates connected cracks, recessed damage and chipped edges for several material families.

triggers.zh-Hans: 砖块破碎, 墙面裂纹, 石头崩边, 材质损坏
triggers.en: broken bricks, wall cracks, chipped stone, damaged material

exampleUsage.zh-Hans: 接在墙壁节点后，调节破损程度、裂纹宽度和崩边碎块。
exampleUsage.en: Place after a wall node and tune damage, crack width and chipped areas.
